stories.title: Add room subdivision data model
stories.description: Extend Room model to support division lines and sub-rooms when RoomPlan captures connected spaces as one room
acceptanceCriteria: Room model has optional divisionLines array of line segments
Room model has optional subRooms array
SubRoom has own name, category, calculated dimensions
Room can calculate sub-room dimensions from division lines
Data persists to UserDefaults via Codable

stories.title: Create RoomDivisionView with floor plan
stories.description: Build interactive view showing captured room floor plan where user can draw division lines
acceptanceCriteria: Show 2D floor plan from room geometry
Display walls, doors, windows from CapturedRoom data
Canvas allows drawing straight lines with tap-and-drag
Lines snap to reasonable angles (0°, 45°, 90°)
Show room dimensions on floor plan
Cancel and Done buttons

stories.title: Sub-room naming and categorization
stories.description: After drawing division lines, let user name each subdivided area and assign room category
acceptanceCriteria: After dividing, show list of detected sub-rooms
Each sub-room shows calculated square footage
User can tap to name each sub-room
User can assign category (Kitchen, Bathroom, etc.)
Auto-suggest room type based on fixtures in that area
Save creates multiple Room records instead of one

stories.title: Add 'Divide Room' button to RoomCard
stories.description: Add UI entry point on captured rooms to launch division editor
acceptanceCriteria: RoomCard menu includes 'Divide Room' option
Button presents RoomDivisionView fullscreen
Only shown for rooms with square footage > 200 SF
After division, original room is replaced with sub-rooms
Maintains all original metadata (photos, annotations)

stories.title: Damage annotation data model
stories.description: Create Annotation model for marking damaged areas on rooms
acceptanceCriteria: Annotation struct with id, roomId, position (x,y,z)
damageType enum (water, fire, smoke, mold, impact, wind, other)
severity enum (light, moderate, heavy)
affectedSurfaces array (floor, wall, ceiling)
affectedHeightIn for water lines
notes text field
photoUrls array
voiceMemoUrl optional string
createdAt timestamp
Codable and stored in Room model

stories.title: Damage annotation UI on RoomCard
stories.description: Add button to RoomCard to mark damage on the floor plan
acceptanceCriteria: RoomCard shows 'Add Damage' button
Button presents DamageAnnotationView
Shows 2D floor plan with tap-to-place markers
Each marker shows icon based on damage type
Tapping marker opens detail sheet
Can add multiple annotations per room

stories.title: Damage annotation detail form
stories.description: Form for specifying damage type, severity, affected areas, and notes
acceptanceCriteria: Picker for damage type with SF Symbols icons
Picker for severity (Light/Moderate/Heavy)
Multi-select for affected surfaces (Floor/Wall/Ceiling)
TextField for affected height (shows for wall damage)
TextEditor for notes
Button to attach photos from camera/library
Button to record voice memo
Save and Cancel buttons

stories.title: Display damage annotations on RoomCard
stories.description: Show summary of damage annotations in room card UI
acceptanceCriteria: RoomCard shows damage count badge if annotations exist
Expandable section lists all annotations
Each annotation shows icon, type, and severity
Tapping annotation opens detail view
Can edit or delete annotations
Shows preview of first attached photo if present

stories.title: Voice memo recording for annotations
stories.description: Add voice recording capability to damage annotations
acceptanceCriteria: Record button in annotation form
Shows recording duration timer
Stop/Cancel recording controls
Playback control for recorded memo
Audio saved to local file
File URL stored in annotation
Audio synced with room data

stories.title: Photo attachment to annotations
stories.description: Allow attaching photos from camera or library to damage markers
acceptanceCriteria: Add Photo button in annotation form
Shows action sheet: Take Photo / Choose from Library
Photos stored locally in app documents
Display thumbnail grid in annotation detail
Tap photo to view full screen
Can delete photos
Photos sync with room data
